name: The Spatter
description: A coolant-leak catchment basin repurposed as a lowColor social hub. Smells of algae and industrial grease.
gm_instructions: Masks whisperCrystal playback. Used for high-heat meetings.

name: Vex’s Scavenge
description: A mountain of decommissioned atmospheric intake filters. Vex lives in a scuttled shuttle hull at the center.
gm_instructions: Vex can find any mechanical part here if players trade information or favors.

name: Sector 43 "The Ghost"
description: A pressurized sub-level that was "erased" from the official Codovan blueprints after a 715 PCE fire.
gm_instructions: Used as a deep-cover safehouse. Requires an Orange-spec bypass key to enter.

name: The Choke
description: A narrow service-pipe corridor connecting the Underbelly to the Dockyards.
gm_instructions: Guarded by a Syndicate "toll-taker." The only way to move gear without sigil-scans.

name: The Signal Splice
description: A high-security communications junction box hidden behind a false marble pillar near the Dueling Court.
gm_instructions: Breaching this allows a 60-second hijack of Ganymede's public HoloCan network.
